privacy.s: 1 publicly-disclosed data breach per Have I Been Pwned (2016) — 57M accounts compromised. Most recent: Uber (2016).

wiki.extract: Uber Technologies, Inc. is an American multinational transportation company that provides ride-hailing services, courier services, food delivery, and freight transport. It is headquartered in San Francisco, California, and operates in approximately 70 countries and 15,000 cities worldwide. It is the largest ridesharing company worldwide with over 202 million monthly active users and 10 million active drivers and couriers. It coordinates an average of 42 million trips and delivery orders per day, and has coordinated 72 billion trips and delivery orders since its inception in 2010. In the fourth

sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves UberScientific Uber Numb Topical Anesthetic Cream and Uber Numb Spray. sampleRecords.event_description: Other fall to lower level  6 to 30 feet
sampleRecords.final_narrative: On August 4, 2025, an employee was painting a residential house from an extension ladder when they went to grab a piece of wooden trim. The trim broke off and they fell approximately 12-15 feet to the back patio paver stones. The employee sustained a fractured right hip.

sampleRecords.event_description: Caught, entangled in running powered equipment  normal operation
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was running the cuber machine (moves and stacks blocks onto pallets) in the block plant. He went to manually move some blocks and the carriage of the cuber moved and pinned his midsection (abdomen, pelvis, and lower back region). The employee was hospitalized with fractures to his bottom two ribs and L3 vertebra. The machine was not locked out/tagged out at the time.
An employee was working in a furnace, tearing out brick from the door jambs. A brick fell from about 5 feet above him and landed on his left middle finger. The fingertip was medically amputated.

sampleRecords.event_description: Struck by other falling object  n.e.c.
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was removing a steel band that was around a stack of steel pipes. One of the pipes fell approximately 42 inches and struck the employee's left foot, resulting in a an amputation to their left big toe at the top joint.

sampleRecords.nature: Cuts, lacerations, punctures without injury to internal structures
sampleRecords.event_description: Fall to lower level from collapsing structure or equipment  unspecified
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was standing on a ladder, masking off a window for painting. The ladder slipped and the employee fell into the window, resulting in lacerations to his hand and leg.
